review_title: Within 3 months all the zippers broke.
review_text: For the ridiculous amount of money Lululemon charges for their products they use by far the cheapest closures I've every seen. Through normal use after 3 months, 2 of the 3 sweatshirts she spent her birthday and Christmas gift money on no longer zip closed. The zipper pulls from the pockets broke off first, then one pocket's zipper's teeth misaligned so it will no longer unzip, and finally the main front zipper's cheap plastic stop completely came off so there is no way to zip it up. Shameful.
My jacket came with stains Im so sad 🥲

As a loyal lulu follower for over 15 years, spending thousands of dollars annually, this jacket has been my biggest disappointment. After only a few wears, the defective seam near where the cuffin and thumb hole meet, created a hole. Over the years, I have had countless other styles and materials (Rulu, Luon, etc) with cuffins and never had issues. It’ll be a pass on the Nulu for me moving forward, especially now that lulu is no longer standing by their products either.

2 days later went to wear it. On route to lululemon I noticed there was a large water stain on the hand cuff (see photo). This is the 3rd item I have purchased with water stains. I asked lululemon to return the item for me in store. They said NO that I had to go home wash &dry the item then bring it back. I asked the manager if this was all in the return policy and he said it was. It states “unwashed and unworn”!! They returned it for me after wasting my time & gas money $128 later
This was my first purchase with Lululemon, and I was surprised at the quality of the product I received. The jacket had a gaping hole on the back and thread hanging from it. I returned it.

Did not receive package. 3 weeks since purchase and company refuses to offer a refund replacement and is just now tracing the package, which will take at least another week. Overpriced and terrible customer service.

review_title: The threading on the sleeve came undone on day 1
review_text: The threading on the sleeve came undone on day 1
I payed 128$ just to wear it once and the material already starts getting bad

I order this jacket for my daughter for Christmas after paying $118 for the jacket it didn’t have the symbol on the back. I am consulting an attorney about False Advertisement what I receive did not look like the picture.

review_title: Serious quality issues and NO customer service
review_text: Serious quality issue. Stitching coming undone on sleeves and multiple pulls throughout different areas of the jacket (not pulling but pulls of fabric coming through!). All of this after literally wearing the jacket for an hour TOPS and not even washing it yet!! The worst part is the customer service. It’s been 11 days about my inquiry into the fabric quality and there has been NO reply whatsoever. I’ve followed up and get a run around message of asking for the same details over and over again without committing to any sort of reply. I otherwise love the jacket and want a resolution but it’s seriously been the customer service (or complete LACK of) that has me flabbergasted and speaks to the apparent “integrity” of this company.

This is the 3rd piece of brand now clothing I've purchased from lululemon that has come damaged due to poor quality. Put this jacket on and my husband told me one of the seams had separated revealing a small hole. Ive had this issue before with either that or threads and stitching pulling off as well.

review_title: Beautiful jacket but does not hold up
review_text: i love the look of this jacket and was obsessed with the pink color and rose gold zipper! But I have had this jacket less than a month and have washed it twice - cold, delicate, by itself, and hung to dry. It has seams ripping and pilling in multiple places.
I wore my new jacket for the first time today and it has a lot of stitching is coming out this has happened to 3 of my jackets now and for the price I would expect this to not happen
This was not delivered to my house and customer support has been extremely unhelpful in tracking it and providing support.

I've bought 3 of these recently. They look amazing for the first wear, then pill terribly, especially around the wrists. How can Lulu be okay with making such low quality items these days? It's disrespectful at this point. Nothing compares to Lulu design but I can't really tolerate it anymore.
When I first opened it, it was perfect but after 1 use it got very piled up and very bad it doesn’t look brand new after 2 use
After one wash it got pills

review_title: Make sure to hand wash this not put in the wash!!
review_text: Looks old after one wash! Definitely hand wash this because I put it in the wash and now the fabric is all bubbly and looks like its 10 years old when I just bought it. Not the best.

I was very excited when the white and gold Nulu jacket was in stock. I’d been eyeballing it forever. After minimal wear and only one wash where I hung to dry, there is already noticeable pilling. I have taken excellent care of this jacket and have the black and gold nulu that I’ve had for years that has zero pilling. I’m not sure what makes this one different, but to say I’ve worn less than ten times (likely less) the pilling is unacceptable for the price.

I really wanted to give this a 5 star review because these are some of my favorite sweaters. But I am really disappointed to find that they pill really bad. Both sides near the armpit area you can see the pilling. I’ve only worn it twice.

I bought this 1 week ago and it is giving Alo vibes. The jacket is pilling and it is not lululemon quality. I am not sure if I received a bad jacket. I don’t know what to do about this jacket and the pilling as this jacket is so comfortable and so nice but the pilling on both arms are very unattractive. If someone knows what I can do to fix this, or if I can go to the store and get a different jacket in place of this, please help!

I bought this sweater less than 2 months ago and have worn it under 3 times. I followed the care instructions exactly, yet the seams are unravelling and it’s pilling like crazy. For nearly $160 in Ontario, Canada, this quality is completely unacceptable. The stitching looks cheap and rushed, and the fabric already feels worn out. I’m genuinely disappointed. Lululemon’s quality has gone downhill, and it’s horrific for this price point.
I initially got it and the back was pretty messed up I wasn’t expecting it to be so scratched for literally no reason, but I want a refund

review_title: Expected MUCH better quality for the cost
review_text: Literally have worn it maybe 4 times, 5 max, and the sleeves and the sleeves on the hand/wrist area are already pilling.
My Jacket had stains and it looked used
Fabric lint balls started along the zipper after 2 wears & I hadn’t even washed it yet.
Very disappointed in the quality. I love lulu and have many pieces. I bought this jacket during Black Friday week sale and ware it 5 times and it looks like this
After a few wears like about 2-3 the stitching sucks and is coming out on the sleeves it’s giving low quality for something that’s 130 dollars
I loved the jacket but when it was opened by my daughter Christmas morning it had black stains all over the front of it

review_title: Pilling on 2nd wear, not washed yet
review_text: The jacket is beautiful but on my 2nd wear, it was already pilling and I hadn't even washed it yet. Super disappointed because this is not cheap.

Paid $120 for the jacket before Christmas for it to go on sale for $85 a week later. More importantly, the stitching in the sleeves is terribly made and is already coming undone after wearing it once.
I received my define jacket that was clearly worn with deodorant stains in the armpit area. For as expensive as this product is they could at least make sure the garment is clean before reselling it.
Poor quality. Fabric pilled after one wear running errands.

I don’t know where the good old Lululemon went. Just bought this jacket on Dec 30, barely a month and two wears, zipper is broken and gone. My daughter absolutely love the jacket, and so upset it is so short lived. USed to be a big fan, guess that feeling is gradually gone. Very concerning the quality went downhill so fast

Bought this jacket for my daughter on dec 30, barely a month and two wears, zipper is broken and gone. Where did the good old Lululemon went. The quality is just going downhill so fast, my daughter is extremely upset as she likes the jacket so much.
I brought my lululemon and only wore it twice but the fabric is already peeling. For the price this quality is unacceptable. Never buying here agan
I rate the color a 2/10 because it’s nowhere near the color that’s showing on the site I contacted them about it

I reached out to the company about the color not looking no where similar to the photo on the site and they brushed me off saying it’s the lighting I also received my item already opened and unfolded which has never happened when shopping with them and they basically said nothing

I initially fell in love with this set because I thought it was going to be like a teal color and I had I was looking for a nice spring summer jacket when I received a jacket the jacket was a forest green I do not believe I have to explain any further .
Washed my jacket twice and it looks like it’s 5 years old. Washed it accordingly, on delicate with all of my lulu stuff no drying

See attached photos for reference; I contacted customer service via email, got one response, I replied by sending them photos in the follow up email, but no response afterwards. It’s almost been a week. I’ve sent another follow up email, again, no response. The broken zipper does not work at all. I will reconsider if I would like to continue my future purchase with Lulu or switch to another brand.
I ordered porcelain pink, it’s not pink it’s light purple and it also looks nothing like any of the photos that are posted
Have been a loyal customer. However, this purchase is trash , the jacket was thrown in a shipping package no wrapping. The jacket is clearly dirty with makeup stains on the front. Very disappointing

review_title: Poor quality - better buying a knock off
review_text: Product started to pill with one time wear, for the amount paid quality could be better. Absolute poor quality

review_title: DO NOT BUY WALNUT CRUNCH WITHOUT CHECKING IN STORE
review_text: This was my 5th set in the last 30 days but now I’ll never buy lulu again. The walnut crunch define jacket and leggings are completely different colors (leggings are basically olive and the top is a pure brown) but because I already took the tag off (I assumed they would be perfect like my other sets and immediately ripped the tags) they refuse to refund or exchange.

I just received this jacket in the mail this week. Pulled it out to wear today and noticed thread coming undone in different parts on the jacket. A brand new jacket! Just frustrating when you’re paying $100+ for this.
I was really looking forward to getting this jacket. However I was let down by the stitching.

review_title: Bad zipper, loose stitching, and beaded up stitch
review_text: I just left a review and wanted to add that not only are the sleeves balling up at the stitch line, loose ends of stitching, the zipper is also janky. It catches alot and seems like it will likely not last. Quality does not align with the price.

I was so excited to get the pink jacket with the gold hardware, it was gonna match a pair of my figs perfectly! But after only wearing it for one shift (dialysis nurse) it started piling on one side of the jacket by the pocket. For a jacket that costs this much, I am pretty disappointed 😔

I purchased this for my 16 year old daughter after one wash we have pilling and wear at thumb holes and on the inside of the jacket there are bra straps are/were of all things. Not what I would expect from athletic wear especially something so expensive and highly coveted. It was washed according to the label and how I was her things period. I even used a laundry bag. :(
I was not satisfied when I got my package, the sizing was correct but it had multiple stains on it. The package was also not packaged properly.

The jacket was great it’s the delivery company that threw me off the guy came to my door with blood on the package and it was open at the bottom some how it got on the jacket and I washed it . It was fine but the delivery company is really odd I didn’t seem to have this problem with the bag I got
Too long for short torso so zipper pops out and looks dumb when sitting and even when standing. 5’3” and ordered size 2. I’d recommend cropped if under 5’4”.
Enjoy the fit but not the quality. Have had the jacket for not even two weeks and already pilling around arm and hand area.

The jacket is beautiful and looks great, I love Lululemon but unfortunately the stitches are already coming apart in this jacket and it keeps getting snagged. I’m disappointed with the quality. I only wore it 3 times

when i received this jacket i was so excited i got a size 0 and it fits perfectly. but i started to notice around the wrists the stitching is coming unraveled which is very upsetting since ive only worn it a few times

I am disappointed because the color is nothing like the photo on the model and this is not pink. If anything it’s a muted purple/gray. It’s not pink whatsoever and very misleading. And this was a final sale so I could not return it for money back.
The color is not what is shown in the photo. It’s like a light grayish pink. But if that’s what you want then get it

review_title: Not even close to color advertised
review_text: I was expecting a pale baby pink as in picture. Color is not even close. It’s more a dusty pale purple. Very disappointed

review_title: they need to be checking the jackets
review_text: So why did I order it and there was white stuff inside the jacket?

Don’t waste your money on this. I followed the washing instructions and honestly only washed my jacket a couple times since I bought it ( I got it only 5 months ago). The gold color on the zipper is already coming. Apparently this is from “ wear and tear”, but I’ve had the jacket for less than 6 months and wore it maybe 5 times and washed it twice, so this is just not normal. I’m so disappointed as this jacket looks so cute and fits nice, but it’s simply not worth the price as the quality is bad
I don’t love the black/gold one since it takes away the sporty look and the gold draws too much attention to the center where as the plain ones look better.

This jacket fits great but is made poorly for the price and absolutely not worth what it retails for. Not sure if I got a defective one since I ordered out of the country. But, there are issues with the stitching in the armpits and arms and the neck area looks already worn out after only wearing it 3 times... NOt worth it!
It looks good but it’s too small
honestly , love lulu but after a few washes it’s not that good of quality

The Nulu Define Jacket is very slimming and flattering. I bought the light pink (“strawberry milkshake”) one for my daughter’s birthday at the end of the summer and she loved it so much that she requested another one for Christmas (a grey-blue one with gold accents). So, why am I only giving three stars to an item that we liked so much that we ended up repurchasing? Because it doesn’t last. Despite us washing the jacket exactly as per the instructions on the tag, the fabric pilled after only a few washes. It also stained very easily. The pictures of the light pink jacket here enclosed are after five months of normal wear. I would not have repurchased it myself, but my daughter loves the look of this jacket so much that in the end the purchase was worth it.
Its a pretty pink color but i found the fabric too thin for my liking I'd prefer the pink in the luon.

review_title: Too expensive to be falling apart.
review_text: Im giving this 3 stars only because it is sooo cute, extremely soft and comfortable and it truly fits really well. However, I only got to wear it ONE time to the gym before it was noticeably damaged. Isnt wearing it to the gym how its intended to be worn? I would get this again but I will never work out in it again. Stick to just walking or running in it. The stitches and inseams seem to be easily messed up as well.
I recently ordered the light ivory gold and spent $118 just for the zipper not even to be gold, it was like it was tarnished or something fresh out the bag and turning into bronze.
I hand washed it with cold water before wearing. This is the water after the third rinse. The length is also unflattering, could be better if it was one inch shorter.

I bought this define jacket online during the Black Friday sale. It was shipped from a store (Red Deer, Alberta) and arrived with several stains. The define jackets are fantastic but it’s incredibly disappointing when you receive a dirty/stained item. It’s especially noticeable on the blush pink. I’m not sure why it was sent looking like that. This was purchased as a Christmas gift for my daughter and I’m glad I looked at it and saw this before wrapping it up!
The grey blue multi haze looks bright teal, with greys blues and green tones in the photo but arrived dull and grey only. Not like the photo at all, same with the leggings.
I LOVEDDDD the color of this in the store so I bought it. I washed it ONE TIME with nothing else colored and the color completely faded away and it looks completely different
The color doesn’t match, the website photos, it looks pink , but, is more in the purple side, so i had to return it, it feels great, and is true size. Is just the color that i didn’t like
I ordered porcelain pink, the product i received looks likes lilac. I really wanted the color that was in the picture and received another color.
I love my new Define jacket and wear it frequently, however if the details and quality could improve a little would be even better

review_title: Comfy but Not What I Expected
review_text: I ordered this jacket in “Porcelain Pink” as it was on sale and the color was cute. Unfortunately, the color is not as pictured—the picture looks like a soft petal pink, but is undeniably pink; the product I received has more of a purple/mauve tone. It’s still very pretty, but I feel the picture is the listing is misleading. Additionally, I have only worn the item once in the week that I’ve had it (and haven’t even washed it yet), but the fabric on the left breast is already pilling and has a patchy texture. Despite the misleading picture, I’m satisfied with the lilac-ish color of the product, and I find it to be just as comfortable and soft as my other define jackets, but I’m just disappointed that this product isn’t holding up well.
I got the full length but didn’t really like it so I switched for cropped and it so much better
